economic_notes: Band owns 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which holds a 13.34% investment in Denendeh Investments Limited Partnership. Investment carried at minimal value as no financial information available.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024. Nation is located in Tsiigehtchic, Northwest Territories. Accumulated deficit of $228,184. Large due-to-related-party balance of $882,644 owed to Tsiigehtchic Charter Community, unsecured and non-interest bearing with no repayment terms. Deferred revenue of $242,280. Investment in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GBE) carried at $121 (minimal value). COVID-19 pandemic noted as uncertainty. Audit opinion states 'qualified opinion' in basis for opinion paragraph but the actual opinion paragraph is unqualified — this appears to be a template error in the auditor's report. expenses_education includes Educational Challenge Surveys ($13,499) and Literacy Program ($7,564). total_government_transfers = INAC $144,377 + GNWT $108,468 = $252,845. osr = $276,550 - $252,845 = $23,705 (other revenues $21,205 + rental $2,500).
